metadata.name: Quote Policy for Customer with Prior Lapse

description: A potential customer is requesting a quote but had a lapse in their previous insurance coverage.

nodes.task_description: Gather applicant information and ask about prior insurance history.

expected_outcome.value: The applicant discloses a 60-day lapse in coverage within the last year.

nodes.task_description: Check underwriting guidelines regarding lapses in coverage.

expected_outcome.value: The agent confirms that a lapse in coverage results in a higher premium but does not make the applicant ineligible.

nodes.task_description: Generate a quote that includes the surcharge for the lapse in coverage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an accurate quote that reflects the higher risk.
